summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. Verified 5-block navigation restructuration (Accueil/Messenger/Wallet/Services/Profil), official JAPAP logo integration, and no feature duplication between blocks. All 24 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI flows working correctly with new navigation structure.
critical_code_review_comments: 5-block navigation correctly implemented: Accueil, Messenger, Wallet, Services, Profil
Official JAPAP logo (japap-logo.jpg) visible on login page hero and sidebar
Login redirects to /feed (not /chat) as per new architecture
Services page has 12 service cards with Marketplace active, others showing 'Bientot'
No duplicate functionality between blocks - wallet only in /wallet, chat only in /chat
Mobile bottom navigation has 5 icons matching desktop sidebar
Admin nav accessible from sidebar for admin users
Feed page has stories row, create post, and posts feed (demo/seed data)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - Feed posts are demo/seed data (not from API)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 verified 5-block navigation restructuration. Key changes: (1) Navigation changed from 4-tab to 5-block (Accueil/Messenger/Wallet/Services/Profil), (2) Default route changed from /chat to /feed, (3) New FeedPage with stories and posts (demo data), (4) New ServicesPage hub with 12 service modules (only Marketplace active), (5) Official JAPAP logo integrated. All wallet operations (deposit, withdraw, send) still work. Chat messaging still works. No feature duplication between blocks.

tests_executed.backend_api_tests: 24/24 passed - All auth, wallet, messaging, admin, user endpoints working
frontend_ui_tests: Login page loads with JAPAP logo on hero
Login with admin@japap.com / JapapAdmin2024! redirects to /feed (not /chat)
5-block navigation: Accueil, Messenger, Wallet, Services, Profil in sidebar
Admin nav visible for admin users
Feed page loads with stories, create post, and posts
Messenger page loads with chat conversations
Wallet page loads with balance and transactions
Services page shows 12 service cards (Marketplace active, others 'Bientot')
Profile page loads with user info
Admin page accessible from sidebar for admin users
No wallet functionality in Services page (no duplication)
No chat functionality in Services page (no duplication)
Mobile bottom navigation has 5 icons: Accueil, Messenger, Wallet, Services, Profil
Mobile menu shows Admin access for admin users
Chat messaging works - conversation opens, message input available

mocked_data_note: Feed posts are demo/seed data (not from API). Services are static with 'Bientot' labels for unavailable modules.
